Bitcoin Mixer Blender

Best mixing service for anonymization bitcoin transactions

  1. Enter the bitcoin address to which you want to send mixed coins. Bitcoin mixer blender.io does not store any logs.
    Select mixing delay for blender.io. The higher the delay, the greater the anonymity.
  2. Blender.io service fee for the distribution. The higher the commission, the greater the anonymity.
    + 0.0003 BTC per each address
  3. You will receive the mixing code after the first mixing in Bitcoin blender. This code guarantees you transaction is not to be mixed by Blender.io with your previous ones
Common mixing mistakes How does it work?
